name: io.github.lukasschwarz/elster-mcp-server
description: Drive the German tax portal ELSTER via Puppeteer: submit UStVA, prepare EUER/ESt, sync inbox.

environmentVariables.name: ELSTER_CONFIG_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to a config.json that holds all settings below. Recommended.

environmentVariables.name: ELSTER_PFX_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to your ELSTER certificate (.pfx).

environmentVariables.name: ELSTER_TAX_NUMBER
environmentVariables.description: Your Steuernummer in the format issued by your Finanzamt.

environmentVariables.name: ELSTER_STATE_CODE
environmentVariables.description: Two-digit ELSTER federal-state code of your Finanzamt.

environmentVariables.name: ELSTER_EST_SKIP_EUR
environmentVariables.description: If 1, skip the EUER pre-hook in ESt sessions.
